refnamediv.refpurpose: Fill a connected image region from a seed point.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: mask = imfloodfill(image, seed) mask = imfloodfill(image, seed, tolerance, connectivity)

listitem.para: Maximum absolute intensity difference from the seed. The default is 0.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: imfloodfill returns a logical mask for the region connected to the seed whose intensity remains within the requested tolerance.

refsection.title: Examples
